scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm --workspace apps/api run build
scripts.build:web: npm run clean:web && npx prisma generate --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.vercel:build: npm run clean:web && npx prisma generate --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && echo '=== TS DIAG ===' && (ls node_modules/typescript/package.json 2>/dev/null && echo 'ts: root OK' || echo 'ts: NOT in root') && (ls apps/web/node_modules/typescript/package.json 2>/dev/null && echo 'ts: apps/web OK' || echo 'ts: not in apps/web') && echo NODE_PATH=$NODE_PATH && npm --workspace apps/web run build
